basic_details.job_title: AVNL Recruitment 2026 – 1213 Vacancies for Junior Technician, Junior/Assistant/Deputy Manager, Senior Manager & Consultant Posts | Apply Online
basic_details.job_type: Fixed Term Employment (1 year, extendable up to 4 years)
basic_details.short_information: Armoured Vehicles Nigam Limited (AVNL), a Defence Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Defence, has released Recruitment Notice AVNL/CO/HR/2026/06 inviting online applications for 1213 posts on Fixed Term Employment. This includes 1005 Non-Executive Junior Technician posts and 208 Executive posts ranging from Junior Manager to Additional General Manager and Consultant. Online applications are open from 11 July 2026 (10:00 AM) to 25 July 2026 (11:55 PM), through the AVNL careers portal.

application_fee.details: Fees must be paid online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI. Fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on the closing date of online registration (25 July 2026). | Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates, 3 years for OBC-NCL candidates, 10 years for PwBD candidates. Relaxation of age for Ex-Servicemen is as per Government guidelines. Upper age limit for an Ex-Trade Apprentice of AVNL is relaxable by the period of apprenticeship training undergone under the Apprenticeship Act.

qualification.details: NTC/NAC (National Trade Certificate/National Apprenticeship Certificate) in the relevant trade, issued by the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT), for all 13 trades: Electrician, Electronic Mechanic, Electroplater, Fitter (General), Forger & Heat Treater, Foundrymen, Machinist, Mechanic Machine Tool Maintenance, OMHE at Raw Material Handling Plant, Painter (General), Quality Assurance Assistant, Rigger, and Welder.

salary_details.details: IDA (Industrial Dearness Allowance) is applicable as per rate in force; the exact current rate is Not specified in the notification. In addition, candidates receive an Annual Increment of 3%, Earned Leave of 18 days per annum, 10 Casual Leave days, Provident Fund, and Gratuity per annum. In-patient medical treatment is provided for the employee and family (spouse and up to two living children) during the engagement, and ceases automatically on discontinuation. No other benefits or facilities are admissible beyond those listed above.

selection_process: followed by a qualifying Trade Test (Practical) at the respective AVNL unit. Merit is decided solely on Written Test marks; the Trade Test syllabus is per Annexure-A of the official notification. Junior Manager
and decision-making. Merit is decided on combined Written Exam and Interview performance. Senior Manager
Consultant posts: No written CBT. Candidates are assessed through Presentation

Avadi. Candidates qualifying the CBT will be called for Interview (other than Junior Technicians) or Trade Test (Junior Technicians) in a post:candidate ratio of 1:3 in order of merit within each category; the final ratio will be decided by AVNL management based on the number of qualifying candidates. Names of candidates shortlisted for CBT
will be notified on the AVNL website.

exam_pattern.details: The written exam is a single Computer Based Test (CBT), objective multiple-choice type, for a maximum of 100 marks, with no negative marking. | Part A questions are up to 10th Standard level for Junior Technician posts, and Graduate level for all other posts. Total time allowed for the written exam is 2 hours. Written exam weightage is 100% for Junior Technician posts and 85% for Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, and Deputy Manager posts. There is no written exam (CBT) for Senior Manager, Deputy General Manager, Additional General Manager, and Consultant posts.

how_to_apply: Visit the AVNL website and click the "Careers" tab at avnl.co.in
Go to Career - "Register"
Fill in Post name, Post Code (auto-selected), Name, Mobile Number, and Email ID
Generate OTP, enter Captcha, and submit
Enter the OTP received
Accept Terms & Conditions via the "I Agree" checkbox, then click re-verify
Select the checkboxes confirming entered values are correct, enter Captcha for re-verification, and submit registration details
Receive the Registration Number, Login ID, and Password on the registered Email/Mobile
Click "Go to Application" or log in again with the Login ID and Password
Fill in the complete application form

Upload photograph, signature, and required documents (DOB proof, Proof of Educational Qualification, Category Certificate, Apprenticeship Training Certificate, PwBD/Ex-Servicemen proof, if applicable)
Preview the application form before submission
Edit details if required (Name, Post Applied, Email ID, and Mobile Number cannot be changed once submitted)
Submit the application by clicking "I Agree" and entering the Captcha
Choose the payment mode and proceed to the Payment Gateway
Do not refresh or navigate back during payment
Verify fee details and pay the application fee online
On successful payment confirmation, you will be redirected back to the submitted application form
Download the Application/Registration form for your records
No document is required to be sent to AVNL by post; the downloaded application slip should be retained by the candidate for future reference.
important_instructions: Selection of Option for ALL Units wherever a post is available is mandatory to complete the application. Candidates should necessarily upload all required documents while applying; applications with incomplete or insufficient documents are liable to be rejected. Candidates are advised to apply for one post; in case of a clash in CBT dates, the candidate must choose one post/trade to appear for. The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed. All computation of age, experience, and qualification requirements will be done with reference to the closing date of online registration. Where a qualifying degree does not mention the required specialization, candidates must submit a certificate from their University/Institution at the time of Interview/Trade Test clearly stating their specialization. Assistive devices/scribes for PwD candidates are allowed at the exam centre, subject to prior permission obtained by emailing [email protected]. Any dispute arising from this recruitment can be instituted only in Chennai; courts/tribunals/forums at Chennai have sole and exclusive jurisdiction. AVNL reserves the right to cancel, restrict, curtail, or enlarge the number of vacancies at any time without notice. Selected candidates are subject to verification of educational/technical qualifications, category/disability certificate, experience certificate, and character & antecedents, and must be declared "Medically Fit" by a competent authority. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. For any issues related to online application submission or fee payment, contact the Help Desk (via the Help Desk tab on the application portal) at 022-61087565, Monday to Friday, 10 AM to 5 PM.

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Notification
content_sections.text: AVNL is a Defence Public Sector Company headquartered at Avadi, Chennai (AVNLCO), operating units including Heavy Vehicles Factory Avadi (HVF), Design and Development Centre HVF Avadi (D2C-HVF), Engine Factory Avadi (EFA), Vehicle Factory Jabalpur (VFJ), Ordnance Factory Medak (OFMK), Design and Development Centre Medak (D2C-OFMK), Machine Tool Prototype Factory Ambernath (MTPF), and AVNL Institutes of Learning at Avadi, Medak, and Ambernath. A direct notification PDF link was not available in the source text used for this article; candidates should check avnl.co.in for the official notification. Download AVNL Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here Apply Here

rows.details: Fixed Term Employment (1 year, extendable up to 4 years)

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details (Non-Executive - Junior Technician Posts)
content_sections.text: 1005 Junior Technician posts are spread across four units, with vacancies broken down by category as follows: Horizontal reservation within these 1005 posts: 11 VH (Visually Handicapped), 10 HH (Hard of Hearing), 09 OH (Orthopedically Handicapped), 09 MD (Multiple Disability), and 108 Ex-Servicemen (Ex-SM).

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details (Executive Posts)
content_sections.text: 208 Executive-cadre posts are distributed as follows: Horizontal reservation within these 208 posts: 01 HH, 02 OH, 01 MD (none specified for VH or Ex-SM in this category). The total projected vacancies are provisional; AVNL reserves the right to increase or decrease the number at the discretion of the management.

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: NTC/NAC (National Trade Certificate/National Apprenticeship Certificate) in the relevant trade, issued by the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT), for all 13 trades: Electrician, Electronic Mechanic, Electroplater, Fitter (General), Forger & Heat Treater, Foundrymen, Machinist, Mechanic Machine Tool Maintenance, OMHE at Raw Material Handling Plant, Painter (General), Quality Assurance Assistant, Rigger, and Welder.

rows.qualification_essential: B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent discipline
B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering or equivalent discipline
B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering or equivalent discipline
B.E./B.Tech in Metallurgy Engineering or equivalent discipline

Graduate degree in any discipline with MBA (HR); OR PG Diploma/Post Graduate in HR/PM&IR/Personnel Management/Industrial Relations/Social Science/Social Welfare/Social Work (2 years) from a recognized University/Institution
Degree with 1-year Diploma in Hindi/Hindi Translation; OR M.A. in Hindi/Hindi Translation

B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/IT/Software Engineering/AI & ML/Electronics & Communications or equivalent. Desirable: knowledge of AI & ML, Electronic Warfare Systems, Cyber Security, Embedded Systems, Counter Measure Techniques
Graduate degree in Commerce/Economics
B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or equivalent discipline
Graduate degree in any discipline with MBA (Finance); OR PG Diploma/PG Degree in Finance & Accounts (2 years) from a recognized University/Institution
Graduate degree in any discipline plus Company Secretary qualification with Associate/Fellow membership of ICSI
B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering/IT/Information Science & Technology/Software Engineering/Computer Technology/Computer Systems/Information Systems/Information Science/Software Engg.
Post Graduate degree in Journalism & Mass Communication
Graduate degree in any discipline with MBA in Marketing Management
B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent. Desirable: 3D Modelling/2D Drafting (Siemens NX, SolidWorks, CATIA, Creo), ANSYS/ABAQUS/HYPERMESH/ADAMS, complex mechanical design drawing
B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering or equivalent. Desirable: Servo drives, electro-mechanical drives, MATLAB simulations, complex electrical circuit design
B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering or equivalent. Desirable: latest electronics technologies, servo drives, transducers/sensors, communications systems, MATLAB simulations

B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/IT/Software Engineering/AI & ML/Electronics & Communications with knowledge of AI & ML, real-time software development, Electronic Warfare Systems, Counter Measures Techniques. Desirable: M.Tech/M.E. in Electronic Warfare/Machine Learning/AI/Cyber Security/Embedded Systems
Chartered Accountant with 10 years of experience handling Finance and Audit in Government departments/PSUs

Retired Officers of the Indian Army (Armoured Corps/Ordnance/Infantry), minimum rank of Colonel (L-13 pay scale and above), with 15 years' experience in Directorate of Army Corps/Procurement of Capital Items/Procurement Category Management

Graduate degree plus Company Secretary qualification (Associate/Fellow, ICSI), minimum 9 years' service including at least 3 years' experience in corporate secretarial matters of a Ratna Category PSU (preferably DPSU or listed company)

B.E./B.Tech in Cyber Security/Computer Science/IT/related fields, OR MCA with Cyber Security Consultant licensing/certification. Experience: Bachelor's in Cyber Security + 1 year relevant experience, OR Bachelor's in other disciplines + 5 years' relevant experience
Degree in Science/Engineering/Technology with 6 years' experience in an Indian Patent Firm; must have passed the Patent Agent Examination (CGPDTM) and be a currently registered Patent Agent

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age is calculated as on the closing date of online registration (25 July 2026). Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates, 3 years for OBC-NCL candidates, 10 years for PwBD candidates. Relaxation of age for Ex-Servicemen is as per Government guidelines. Upper age limit for an Ex-Trade Apprentice of AVNL is relaxable by the period of apprenticeship training undergone under the Apprenticeship Act.

rows.post_category: Junior Technician, Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, Deputy Manager
rows.age_limit: Up to 30 years (maximum 55 years with all relaxations on age)

rows.post_category: Senior Manager, Deputy General Manager, Additional General Manager, Consultant
rows.age_limit: Below 65 years (inclusive of all relaxation on age)

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Remuneration
content_sections.text: IDA (Industrial Dearness Allowance) is applicable as per rate in force; the exact current rate is Not specified in the notification. In addition, candidates receive an Annual Increment of 3%, Earned Leave of 18 days per annum, 10 Casual Leave days, Provident Fund, and Gratuity per annum. In-patient medical treatment is provided for the employee and family (spouse and up to two living children) during the engagement, and ceases automatically on discontinuation. No other benefits or facilities are admissible beyond those listed above.

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fees must be paid online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI. Fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Exam Pattern
content_sections.text: The written exam is a single Computer Based Test (CBT), objective multiple-choice type, for a maximum of 100 marks, with no negative marking. Part A questions are up to 10th Standard level for Junior Technician posts, and Graduate level for all other posts. Total time allowed for the written exam is 2 hours. Written exam weightage is 100% for Junior Technician posts and 85% for Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, and Deputy Manager posts. There is no written exam (CBT) for Senior Manager, Deputy General Manager, Additional General Manager, and Consultant posts.

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Junior Technician posts: CBT, followed by a qualifying Trade Test (Practical) at the respective AVNL unit. Merit is decided solely on Written Test marks; the Trade Test syllabus is per Annexure-A of the official notification. Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, Deputy Manager posts: CBT, followed by an Interview (50 marks, 15% weightage) assessing technical knowledge, prior work experience, initiative, and decision-making. Merit is decided on combined Written Exam and Interview performance. Senior Manager, Deputy General Manager, Additional General Manager, Consultant posts: No written CBT. Candidates are assessed through Presentation, Experience, Expertise, Knowledge, and Interview, conducted at AVNL CO, Avadi. Candidates qualifying the CBT will be called for Interview (other than Junior Technicians) or Trade Test (Junior Technicians) in a post:candidate ratio of 1:3 in order of merit within each category; the final ratio will be decided by AVNL management based on the number of qualifying candidates. Names of candidates shortlisted for CBT, Interview, or Trade Test, and final selections, will be notified on the AVNL website.

content_sections.heading: AVNL Recruitment 2026: Test Centres
content_sections.text: The CBT will be held at: Chennai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Jabalpur, Nagpur, Pune, Mumbai, New Delhi, Kolkata, and Kanpur. Candidates must indicate their preferred test centre in the online application form. AVNL reserves the right to modify, add, or cancel test centres depending on the number of eligible applicants; affected candidates will be assigned a new centre.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for AVNL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Class X passing certificate/marksheet, PAN Card, and Aadhaar Card for name and date-of-birth proof (name and DOB must match across all documents) Caste/disability certificate (for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS candidates), as applicable Trade Apprentice Training Certificate (for Ex-Trade Apprentices of AVNL) OBC-NCL certificate in central format for the current financial year (FY 2026-27) EWS candidates: current-year Income & Asset certificate (valid for FY 2026-27, based on FY 2025-26 income) Disability certificate as per the latest prescribed central government format, generated via the Swavalamban/UDID portal, clearly indicating type and percentage of disability NTC/NAC certificate in the relevant trade issued by NCVT (for Junior Technician posts) Bachelor's Degree (Provisional/Final) Certificate (for all other posts)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AVNL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the AVNL website and click the "Careers" tab at avnl.co.in Go to Career - "Register" Fill in Post name, Post Code (auto-selected), Name, Mobile Number, and Email ID Generate OTP, enter Captcha, and submit Enter the OTP received Accept Terms & Conditions via the "I Agree" checkbox, then click re-verify Select the checkboxes confirming entered values are correct, enter Captcha for re-verification, and submit registration details Receive the Registration Number, Login ID, and Password on the registered Email/Mobile Click "Go to Application" or log in again with the Login ID and Password Fill in the complete application form Upload photograph, signature, and required documents (DOB proof, Proof of Educational Qualification, Category Certificate, Apprenticeship Training Certificate, PwBD/Ex-Servicemen proof, if applicable) Preview the application form before submission Edit details if required (Name, Post Applied, Email ID, and Mobile Number cannot be changed once submitted) Submit the application by clicking "I Agree" and entering the Captcha Choose the payment mode and proceed to the Payment Gateway Do not refresh or navigate back during payment Verify fee details and pay the application fee online On successful payment confirmation, you will be redirected back to the submitted application form Download the Application/Registration form for your records No document is required to be sent to AVNL by post; the downloaded application slip should be retained by the candidate for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Selection of Option for ALL Units wherever a post is available is mandatory to complete the application. Candidates should necessarily upload all required documents while applying; applications with incomplete or insufficient documents are liable to be rejected. Candidates are advised to apply for one post; in case of a clash in CBT dates, the candidate must choose one post/trade to appear for. The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed. All computation of age, experience, and qualification requirements will be done with reference to the closing date of online registration. Where a qualifying degree does not mention the required specialization, candidates must submit a certificate from their University/Institution at the time of Interview/Trade Test clearly stating their specialization. Assistive devices/scribes for PwD candidates are allowed at the exam centre, subject to prior permission obtained by emailing [email protected] . Any dispute arising from this recruitment can be instituted only in Chennai; courts/tribunals/forums at Chennai have sole and exclusive jurisdiction. AVNL reserves the right to cancel, restrict, curtail, or enlarge the number of vacancies at any time without notice. Selected candidates are subject to verification of educational/technical qualifications, category/disability certificate, experience certificate, and character & antecedents, and must be declared "Medically Fit" by a competent authority. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. For any issues related to online application submission or fee payment, contact the Help Desk (via the Help Desk tab on the application portal) at 022-61087565, Monday to Friday, 10 AM to 5 PM.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AVNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 25 July 2026 at 11:55 PM. Applications opened on 11 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in AVNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 1213 vacancies in total: 1005 Non-Executive Junior Technician posts and 208 Executive posts, spread across AVNL units at Avadi, Medak, Jabalpur, and Ambernath.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for AVNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rs. 300/- (non-refundable) for General, EWS, and OBC candidates. There is no fee for SC, ST, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen, and Female candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for AVNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Up to 30 years (maximum 55 with all relaxations) for Junior Technician, Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, and Deputy Manager posts. Below 65 years (inclusive of all relaxations) for Senior Manager, Deputy General Manager, Additional General Manager, and Consultant posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for AVNL Junior Technician posts?
faq.answer: Junior Technicians receive a Basic pay of Rs. 21,000, plus a Special Allowance of Rs. 1,050, plus Rs. 3,000 for medical insurance, conveyance, and mobile charges - a total of Rs. 25,050 plus IDA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What qualification is required for AVNL Junior Technician posts?
faq.answer: An NTC/NAC certificate in the relevant trade, issued by the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AVNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by an Interview (Junior/Assistant/Deputy Manager posts) or Trade Test (Junior Technician posts). Senior Manager, Deputy General Manager, Additional General Manager, and Consultant posts have no written test and are selected via Presentation, Experience/Expertise assessment, and Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job at AVNL?
faq.answer: No. All posts under this notification are on Fixed Term Employment - 1 year initially, extendable up to a maximum of 4 years. The engagement is purely contractual, and candidates cannot claim regular employment in AVNL.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the AVNL Recruitment 2026 exam be held?
faq.answer: The CBT will be conducted at Chennai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Jabalpur, Nagpur, Pune, Mumbai, New Delhi, Kolkata, and Kanpur, based on the candidate's preference indicated in the application form.
